brand.name: Lan Yeh Bridal Makeup
brand.tagline: Quiet elegance, crafted for every ceremony

heroSlides.excerpt: From dawn preparation to candlelit banquet — twenty years of meticulous craft, designing the visual narrative of your day.

heroSlides.titleTop: The moment you step into the light
heroSlides.excerpt: Awards nights, brand events, intimate galas — making you the most luminous presence in the room.
Editorial and bridal shoots, with makeup designed alongside lighting and theme — studio or on-location.

about.p1: Since 2002, I've styled over a thousand brides and hundreds of banquets. When a bride walks in, I'm not looking for a style — I'm looking for the moment her gaze becomes most truly hers.
about.p2: A bridal look is not a template — it's a conversation. From skin tone, features, gown texture, ceremony mood, to the light on the day — every element is composed so you become the most assured presence in your own ritual.

services.title: From dawn light to candle glow
services.subtitle: Bridal · Engagement · Mother of the Bride · Evening · Editorial · Private Lessons — every ceremony deserves a meticulous craft.

testimonials.title: They Said
testimonials.subtitle: Every word from our brides is why I continue this work.

hero.intro: Teacher Lan Yeh — studio in Chiayi, on-location service across Taiwan. From bridal coverage to editorial styling, our work appears in ballrooms and outdoor venues in Taipei, Taichung, Tainan, Kaohsiung, Yilan, Hualien, and at destination weddings abroad.

profile.p1: I trained under a strict teacher who made me practice base makeup for three full months. She said: the most important thing about a bride isn't her eyeshadow — it's the breathing quality of her skin. I've remembered that every day since.
profile.p2: I began in Taichung, then returned to my hometown Chiayi to open my own studio. Over the years I've styled more than a thousand couples. In this city I've watched girls walk into grand halls, down red carpets, into new lives. I remember the light, the laughter, and the moment they cried.
profile.p3: The heart of this work is not 'makeup' — it's 'accompaniment.' Sharing the most nervous hours before the ceremony, doing touch-ups, checking the hairstyle together. And when the day is done and the photographs come back — you look in the frame and say, 'Ah, that is me.'
profile.quote: — That moment is the whole reason I do this work.

items.title: Seeing your essence
items.desc: No templates. From skin tone, bone structure, eye shape, to the way you speak and dress — your makeup should be an extension of you, not a mask.

items.title: Respecting the ceremony
items.desc: Sun-lit chapels, banquet halls, intimate engagements — each setting calls for its own intensity of light and color.

items.title: Camera-ready always
items.desc: 4K cameras, long video, close family photos — your base must remain transparent yet enduring. Every layer is for the album you'll keep for life.

items.title: Companionship
items.desc: The hours before the ceremony are the most anxious. I will make these hours feel like a long chat with a trusted friend.

timeline.title: The Studio's Journey
timeline.subtitle: Over twenty years of meetings, each one a new beginning.

hero.intro: From bridal coverage to gala styling, from private lessons to destination weddings — our six core services. Studio in Chiayi with {strong}: north (Taipei, Taoyuan, Hsinchu), central (Taichung, Changhua), south (Tainan, Kaohsiung, Pingtung), east (Yilan, Hualien, Taitung). Pricing tailored to your event, location, and number of looks. Inquire via LINE or the form.
hero.introStrong: on-location service across all of Taiwan

items.title: Inquiry
items.desc: Reach out via LINE or the form — share your date, venue, and estimated number of looks so we can confirm availability.

items.title: Quote & Reservation
items.desc: Once your date and needs are confirmed, a quote is provided. A deposit reserves your exclusive day.

items.title: Trial & Discussion
items.desc: One month before, we hold a trial session — discussing gown style, venue light, and skin condition to refine the look.

items.title: Wedding Day
items.desc: At the agreed time we arrive at your home or hotel — full-day touch-ups and look transitions, choreographed to your schedule.

items.title: Afterwards
items.desc: We follow up after the ceremony — building a long-term relationship, ready for anniversary shoots and evening events.

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: At least 4–6 months; peak seasons (spring, autumn) often more. We accept only one couple per day.
Yes. Based in Chiayi, we serve all of Taiwan; out-of-town engagements include travel and lodging.
Trial sessions are highly recommended to align on direction and avoid surprises on the day.
Date changes are accommodated up to 2 months before, subject to availability. Full terms are provided upon booking.
We offer basic crown, headpiece, hairpins and earring rentals; bouquets can be ordered or provided by you.
Yes — past work includes Japan, Bali, Okinawa. Please plan at least 6 months ahead.

area.title: Chiayi studio ・ on-location across Taiwan
area.intro: Based in Chiayi with on-location service throughout Taiwan: north — Taipei, Taoyuan, Hsinchu; central — Taichung, Changhua, Yunlin; south — Tainan, Kaohsiung, Pingtung; east — Yilan, Hualien, Taitung. Destination weddings welcome. Travel and lodging billed outside the home region; international weddings quoted separately.
